{{BiomeInfo}}

=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 22   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 60   

Roughness: 10   

Hills: 10   

Music: Leaves   

Valid Player Spawn: True   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.36   

Log: Mahogany Log   

Top: Mahogany Top   

Height: 6   

Height Variation: 10   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 3.5   

leafRadius_variation: 1.5   

leaves: Mahogany Leaves   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.2   

Log: Mahogany Log   

Top: Mahogany Top   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 0   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 2   

leafRadius_variation: 2   

leaves: Mahogany Leaves   

type: Round   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.04   

Block: Soil   

Width: 4   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 2   

smoothness: 0.2   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.4   

Block: Grass Vegetation   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 0   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.007   

Block: Hibiscus   

Width: 8   

Variation: 3   

Density: 0.1   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
